title: Craftable Gunpowder(bonemeal&charcoal)
description: Craft gunpowder with  coal/charcoal and bone meal!
body:
Create a recipe for gunpowder using coal/charcoal and bonemeal. This recipe is ideal for gun mods that require large amounts of gunpowder for crafting bullets. It's also well-suited for zombie apocalypse-themed survival modpacks.

*Just provide the recipe, no extra functions.
